symptoms.symptom_name: Deep painful bleeding fissures in thick psoriatic plaques

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fissuring of thick hyperkeratotic plaques over an extensor joint is characteristic.

symptoms.symptom_name: Blanching localised rim; afebrile; no pus/induration/lymphangitis

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A blanching, localised, afebrile rim without pus/warmth/streaks argues strongly against cellulitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: No olecranon fluctuance; painless passive joint movement

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No fluctuant swelling and painless joint movement argue against septic bursitis/joint.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fissuring after lapsed topical therapy in dry weather

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Lapsed treatment and dry weather explain the acute fissuring.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine GP review to restart/optimise topical psoriasis therapy
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Restart calcipotriol/betamethasone and emollients; consider dermatology if extensive.
Not indicated without clinical signs of infection (retained only in the safety-net).
